headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Huntington Ingalls Indus, Lowers Price Target to $441
summary: Citigroup  analyst John Godyn   maintains Huntington Ingalls Indus (NYSE:HII) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $465 to $441.
